'''Ramodi''' was a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a [[Baradium/Legends|baradium]] smuggling ring, rimward of [[Borao]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1stm}}
